block.zombierool.activator.generic.toolt: §7it sends a signal to all '%s Receptors' on the map.
block.zombierool.blind_buy.tooltip.2: Reveals its hidden weapon upon purchase.
block.zombierool.blind_buy.tooltip.3: Can also be used to restock ammo.
block.zombierool.buy_wall_weapon.tooltip: §7Right Click with a block to copy its texture.
block.zombierool.defense_door.tooltip.8: §7Sneak while placing to center the door.
block.zombierool.defense_door.tooltip.9: §cCREATIVE + SNEAK + RIGHT CLICK (empty hand): Toggle permanently open.
block.zombierool.limit.tooltip.2: §7Typically placed on the ceiling, above Path Blocks.
block.zombierool.limit.tooltip.3: §7Prevents hostile entities from using paths on the floor below.
block.zombierool.limit.tooltip.4: §7Invisible and non-collidable for players in Survival mode.
block.zombierool.meteorite.tooltip.2: §7Interactive block to activate a secret song.
block.zombierool.meteorite.tooltip.4: §7Player must look at it and press Action key.
block.zombierool.mystery_box.tooltip.2: §7Get a random weapon in exchange for points.
block.zombierool.obstacle_door.tooltip.2: §7Right Click with a block to copy its texture.
block.zombierool.path.tooltip.3: §7If a player can reach a location, zombies can follow.
block.zombierool.path.tooltip.4: §7Acts as a 'playable zone' for hostile entities.
block.zombierool.path.tooltip.5: §7Invisible and non-collidable for players in Survival mode.
block.zombierool.powerswitch.tooltip.2: §7Once activated (right-click), it sends a signal to 'Activator' blocks.
block.zombierool.powerswitch.tooltip.3: §7'Activator' blocks then transmit a Redstone signal.
block.zombierool.powerswitch.tooltip.5: §7(Can be deactivated in Creative mode for game reset).
block.zombierool.receptor.generic.toolti: §7this receptor sends a Redstone signal all around itself.
block.zombierool.restrict.tooltip.3: §7Invisible and non-collidable for players in Survival mode (except projectiles).
block.zombierool.traitor.tooltip.2: §7Right Click with a block (Creative) to copy its texture.
block.zombierool.traitor.tooltip.3: §7Destroys itself on contact with a zombie.
block.zombierool.zombie_pass.tooltip.3: §7Allows hostile entities (zombies, etc.) to pass through.
